entry.value: [["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","onboarding","a|0|1|2|3|4|5|6","1d8a11f9-98d6-4560-9943-a21bdbfc8399","o|","auto","b|T","a|","a|8","id","name","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","rootTaskUuid","feedbackStates","toolUseStates","chatHistory","draftExchange","a|E|F|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R","Desktop Commander Capability Test\n","2026-03-15T07:58:11.706Z","2026-03-15T10:51:45.574Z","claude-opus-4-6","b|F","isAgentConversation","a|Y","o|Z|B","23b910fe-f3a2-443d-a568-e675e61ed731","request_message","rich_text_json_repr","status","mentioned_items","a|c|d|e|f","将数据库改为mySQL 9,删除原有SQLlite的文件","type","content","a|i|j","doc","paragraph","text","a|i|n","o|o|n|h","a|p","o|k|m|q","a|r","o|k|l|s","draft","o|g|h|t|u|C","o|S|8|T|U|V|W|C|X|X|a|b|9|9|C|v","o|D|w","shown","workspaceQuestions","a|y|z","o|10|X|C","o|7|8|9|A|B|C|x|11"],"12"]
